title: PET-FM-Bench: Pre-Registered Cross-Foundation-Model Benchmark on Nuclear-Medicine Imaging Tasks with Systematic Contamination Audit — Analysis Code
description:
Reproducibility code for: Pretraining Domain Predicts Test–Retest Reproducibility of Foundation Models on PET: A Pre-Registered Nine-Task Benchmark with Contamination Audit (PET-FM-Bench).

Repository contents: 47 Kaggle-runnable analysis notebooks (per-task preprocessing and embedding extraction; Phase 1 FM checkpoint manifest; Phase 2 contamination audit; Phase 4 patient-level splits; IBSI pyradiomics baseline via MIRP; 10-seed random-initialisation control; Phase 5 main probe pipeline at SEED = 42; manuscript figure rendering); a Python source package (src/contamination, src/preprocess, src/probes); cohort acquisition guide; data dictionary for the public result CSVs; and the four manuscript figures (PNG 300 dpi + vector PDF) regeneratable from the deposited public Kaggle dataset.

The benchmark was pre-registered on OSF on 2026-04-25 prior to any probe analysis. Twelve methodological deviations were logged in the amendment log before each affected analysis was executed. Run-time pipeline SHA-256: 7ca32e8bb244845df6313de146d01ac8aaf7871cfcbccb2fdb61e62374227401 (probe_analysis.py v6, 2,960 lines).
